mapper.sql: id, team_no, activity_id, product_id, leader_user_id, required_size, paid_size, status, expire_time, success_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_team (team_no, activity_id, product_id, leader_user_id, required_size, paid_size, status, expire_time, success_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{teamNo}, #{activityId}, #{productId}, #{leaderUserId}, #{requiredSize}, #{paidSize}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, #{successTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_team WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM group_buy_team WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM group_buy_team WHERE team_no = #{teamNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_team SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_buy_team SET status = 1, success_time = #{successTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_buy_team SET paid_size = #{paidSize}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_buy_team SET paid_size = paid_size + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND paid_size < required_size
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_team WHERE status = 0 AND expire_time < #{now} ORDER BY expire_time ASC
